title: Listening ETS 2026 — Test 3
desc: Listening Test 3, câu 1–100 — file đề gốc dạng snapshot + audio. Đáp án theo key gốc cuối sách.

Questions thirty two through thirty four refer to the following conversation
Hi, chef Ayaka. I was looking over this week's sales and I noticed that a lot of people ordered the beef stew special
Yeah, it's been very popular with patrons. In fact, I want to add it to the regular menu good idea
Beef prices change frequently though
So we might need to consider that when we set the price for the dish if we're going to offer it daily
Okay, I'll call our supplier too. We need to make sure they can get us enough beef each week

Number thirty four, what does the woman say she will do?

items.transcript:
Questions 41 through 43 refer to the following conversation
Marcel I don't know if you reviewed the latest report
Unfortunately, our sales are continuing to drop
Yes, competition is at an all-time high more and more companies are selling clothing and gear for outdoor recreation
We need better ways to make our brand stand out
Well, we could probably benefit from having more direct input from athletes who use our gear
I was thinking maybe we could hire a professional rock climber to consult with our designers
That's an interesting idea. Is there anyone you have in mind? I'll email you a list this afternoon
Number 41, what problem does the woman mention?
Number 42, where do the speakers most likely work?
Number 43, what does the man say he will do this afternoon?

items.transcript:
Questions 44 through 46 refer to the following conversation
Hello, I was featured in an article in your newspaper about five years ago
And now when I click on the link nothing happens
Oh the public links expire after three years
But I can search for your article in our database. I just need keywords from the article to use in the search
It was about my internship at a dental office. Okay, let me check our archives. Thanks
I was still in college when the article came out
But now I'm starting my own practice and I'd like to hang the article on the wall. Oh
Congratulations
Number 44, why is the woman calling?
You
Number 45, what does the man offer to do?
Number 46, why does the man congratulate the woman?

items.transcript:
Questions 50 through 52 refer to the following conversation
Welcome back. How were your lunch deliveries?
All right, except one bag broke and the food container fell out right as I was walking up to a customer's door
The container was still sealed and the customer accepted it. So it turned out okay in the end
Well, i'm glad everything worked out
By the way, take a look at my screen. I got the new delivery software installed and running while you were gone
This looks great. I like how different areas can be grouped together. So drivers can deliver more efficiently
Me too. And since we've recently had such a significant increase in customers, this will be really useful
Number 50, what most likely is the man's job?
Number 51, what did the woman do while the man was gone?
Number 52, what does the woman say has recently changed?

Hi, Jina. I've got good news. We signed a contract to create an ad campaign for a new client
That's great. Who is it?
It's hmd incorporated an organic snack company
They just developed a new line of snacks made entirely from vegetables
They want to market the snacks to sports teams as well as individuals
Well, that sounds exciting but hard to understand
I guess we'll need to learn more about the products first. Exactly
We'll have the client come in to give us nutritional information and provide us with some samples
I'll schedule a meeting with them soon
Number 53, what type of company do the speakers work for?

items.transcript:
Questions 56 through 58 refer to the following conversation with three speakers
Oliver have you finished the maintenance check on the small airplane that came in this morning?
The owner is hoping to fly at this weekend
I finished checking it earlier this morning. It needs a new fuel injection pump
So I've asked Camille to order one. Oh here she comes. Camille will the new pump arrive today?
Unfortunately, no, the manufacturer said there'll be a delay and it won't arrive until monday
I better let the customer know she was planning to fly the plane to toronto this weekend for a friend's wedding
She'll need to find another way to get there
Number 56, what did the man perform a maintenance check on?
So
Number 57, what news does Camille share?
Number 58, why is the customer traveling to toronto?

items.transcript:
Questions 59 through 61 refer to the following conversation
Hello, you've reached the customer service line for quality internet service. How can I help you?
I'm Mona Shanek and my account number's pk62h5
I'd like to close my account on june 30th
Oh, have you been experiencing issues with the service?
Actually, my company has asked me to relocate to spain
That's exciting. I'll take care of your request for you then. Thank you. I appreciate that
When i'm done updating your records, would you be willing to stay on the phone line to take a survey about your experience as a customer?
certainly
Number 59, what type of business does the man work for?
Number 60, what does the woman imply when she says my company has asked me to relocate to spain?

Hello, welcome to agcast a podcast all about the latest news in agriculture
Before we get started with today's episode i'd like to note that I provided the wrong dates for the farming exposition during last week's episode
The start date of the event is march 31st, not the 21st. I'm sorry about that
Okay, let's move on to today's guest. Ms. Junco Adachi is the director at Fertilizer One, a non-profit organization that provides small farms with low-cost fertilizer
During her time as director the organization has helped over 1,000 small farms increase their yields

questions.explanation: Đáp án theo answer key gốc của Listening ETS 2026 Test 3. Đọc lựa chọn trong ảnh đề và đối chiếu với transcript/audio.

items.transcript:
Questions 83 through 85 refer to the following telephone message
Hi, mr. Flores. This is susana the supervisor of the construction crew working on your renovation project
I'm calling because we've run into an issue with the front window replacements
Your house was built a long time ago and has settled over the years
Unfortunately, this has caused some frame alignment issues
We will not be able to install the new bay window you requested for the front room without more extensive work than the budget will cover
Our work is done for today, but we'll need to know how to proceed by tomorrow
I'll be available for the next couple of hours
Number 83, what industry does the speaker work in?
Number 84 according to the speaker what has caused a problem?
Number 85, why does the speaker say i'll be available for the next couple of hours?

items.transcript:
Questions 86 through 88 refer to the following excerpt from a meeting
You may remember that our bank branch was evaluated by auditors from our headquarters last week
Well, I received their report today. They looked at everything from how we handle record keeping for accounts and
Transactions to how our bank tellers interact with individual customers
Above all they were impressed with the quality of our customer service
Specifically how we greet customers and direct them to the right associate. However, we received low ratings on marketing our other products
I'd like all supervisors to talk to their staff about strategies to pitch our products and services to customers
Number 86, who most likely is the speaker?
Number 87 according to the speaker. What were some auditors impressed with?
Number 88, what does the speaker ask supervisors to do?

items.transcript:
Questions 89 through 91 refer to the following talk
Oh good. I'm glad to see everyone is here early as requested
We have an unusually busy night ahead of us due to the addition of six large group reservations
We'll set up for those first in the overflow room
Tables will need to come out of storage. I'll unlock the door after this meeting
But before you start your shift make sure to try tonight's specials
They're in their usual spot under the heat lamps. Be sure you promote the truffles dish in particular
We'd like to see if this could be a permanent menu item
Management will be watching closely its price point is high, but it really is delicious
Number 89, why does the speaker call employees in early?
Number 90, what should be retrieved from storage?
Number 91
What does the speaker mean when he says management will be watching closely?

questions.question: What did professor yun hong do last month?
questions.explanation: Đáp án theo answer key gốc của Listening ETS 2026 Test 3. Đọc lựa chọn trong ảnh đề và đối chiếu với transcript/audio.

items.transcript:
Questions 92 through 94 refer to the following broadcast
Hello and welcome to WBCO financial news
Tonight we're talking about the prices we pay online for goods and services
In particular we'll look at why you may pay more if you shop during times of peak demand
Called surge pricing this trend first started with computer software that allowed large airlines to track demand and quickly change their ticket prices
That technology is now widely available. You may find that even small businesses charge more when demand is higher
Our guest today is professor yun hong a leading expert on the topic
Last month. He was the featured speaker at the international economic summit
Number 92, what type of news is the broadcast about?
Number 93, why does the speaker say that technology is now widely available?
Number 94, what did professor yun hong do last month?

items.transcript:
Questions 95 through 97 refer to the following telephone message and coupon
Hi, this is Liam from Oceana flowers. I'm calling about our print order for coupons
We originally said we needed the coupons by friday, but we now need them to be ready by wednesday instead
We just found out yesterday that our application to the national florist association was approved
We'll be attending their annual floral show in richmond this weekend
Oh one other thing we'd also like to change the limit to five items on the coupon
Can you take care of that before you start printing? Thank you
Number 95, why is the speaker calling?
Number 96, what did the speaker find out yesterday?
Number 97, look at the graphic which number does the speaker want to change?

items.transcript:
Questions 98 through 100 refer to the following message and bus map
Hi takuma. Good news. You got your first television audition. It's for a role in a tv drama
I've sent an email with the script and details
Since you're auditioning to join the cast of an ongoing show
You should watch some videos of previous episodes so you understand the role
One last note since you're new to the city. You might be wondering about the best bus route to take
You could take the green line to orchard, but i'd recommend taking the yellow line to the last stop
It's a longer route, but the last stop is closer to the studio
Number 98, who most likely is the listener?
Number 99 according to the speaker. What should the listener do to prepare?
Number 100, look at the graphic which bus stop does the speaker recommend getting off at?
